channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Global geopolitical news headlines curated from Tier 1 and Tier 2 sources

item.title: 🇮🇱⚔️ IDF Infantry Commander Killed by Hezbollah Drone in Southern Lebanon
item.description: Captain Maoz Israel Recanati, 24, was killed by a Hezbollah drone attack in southern Lebanon. He was set to marry next month. The IDF struck over 100 targets in response.
item.dc:creator: Times of Israel

item.title: 🇵🇸🏛️ Jerusalem Governorate Warns of Israeli Plan to Seize Properties Near Al-Aqsa
item.description: Palestinian authorities warn that Israel plans to approve seizure of Palestinian properties in the Bab al-Silsila neighborhood near Al-Aqsa Mosque on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Anadolu Agency

item.title: 🇭🇰🇺🇸 Trump Not Optimistic on Jimmy Lai Release After Raising Case With Xi
item.description: US President Trump says he raised the case of imprisoned Hong Kong media tycoon Jimmy Lai with Chinese President Xi, but is not optimistic about his release. Lai was sentenced to 20 years under Hong Kong national security law.
item.dc:creator: SCMP

item.title: 🇷🇺🇨🇳 Putin to Visit China Days After Trump Trip
item.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin will meet Chinese leader Xi Jinping on a two-day trip to Beijing next week. The announcement comes just after Trump wrapped up the first visit to China by a US president in years.
item.dc:creator: Channel News Asia

item.title: 🇱🇧⚠️ Hezbollah Urges Lebanon to Abandon Peace Illusions With Israel
item.description: Hezbollah warned Lebanese authorities against direct negotiations with Israel as Washington pushes forward with a new round of talks between Beirut and Tel Aviv.
item.dc:creator: Anadolu Agency

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel kills Hamas military chief Izz al-Din al-Haddad in Gaza strike
item.description: An Israeli airstrike killed the head of Hamas armed wing, the most senior Hamas official killed since the October ceasefire. Israel says he helped plan the Oct 7 attacks.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇷🇺🇨🇳 Putin to visit China days after Trump summit as Russia seeks strategic support
item.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin will meet Xi Jinping in Beijing next week, just after Trump became the first US president to visit China since 2017.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇷🇴 Romania finds unexploded projectile near Ukraine border
item.description: NATO member Romania discovered an unexploded projectile on property near its Ukraine border, highlighting spillover risks from the ongoing conflict.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇨🇩 Ebola outbreak in Congo reports 80 deaths amid constant burials
item.description: A new Ebola outbreak in eastern Congo has killed at least 80 people, with locals describing continuous burials as authorities struggle to contain the spread.
item.dc:creator: NBC News

item.title: 🇰🇲 Comoros suspends fuel price hikes after deadly Iran-war protests
item.description: The East African island nation backed down on fuel price increases triggered by the Iran conflict after protests turned deadly across the archipelago.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: ⚔️ CBS News Live: Israel Strikes Lebanon as Iran Distrusts US
item.description: CBS News provides ongoing coverage of Middle East tensions as Israel conducts strikes in Lebanon while Iran expresses deep mistrust of American involvement in the conflict.
item.dc:creator: CBS News

item.title: 🇺🇸 Iran War Worth Economic Pain, Say Rural Trump Voters
item.description: Despite rising gas prices and economic strain from the Iran conflict, rural Colorado voters remain steadfast in their support for Trump administration policies.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🏫 Diesel Costs From Iran War Drain US School Budgets
item.description: Soaring diesel prices since the onset of the Iran war are straining already tight US school district budgets, making it more expensive to bus students.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇨🇴 Colombia Mayor Shot Dead During Election Campaign
item.description: A former mayor allied with presidential candidate Abelardo de La Espriella was assassinated in central Colombia amid escalating election violence.
item.dc:creator: AP News

item.title: 🇳🇬 S&P Upgrades Nigeria on Improving Macroeconomic Profile
item.description: Credit ratings agency S&P upgraded Nigeria long-term sovereign rating to B from B-, citing improving creditworthiness and economic reforms.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🛢️ Iran Plans Fees for Ships Passing Through Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Iran is preparing to charge fees for commercial vessels transiting the strategic Strait of Hormuz amid tensions with the US and Israel. Only vessels from cooperative countries would benefit under the proposed mechanism, tightening control over a critical oil transit route.
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera

item.title: 🇳🇬 Over 50 Schoolchildren Including Toddlers Kidnapped in Nigeria
item.description: Gunmen abducted more than 50 children, many aged 2-5 years old, from three schools in Mussa, Borno state. Attackers used children as human shields while fleeing on motorbikes. No group has claimed responsibility, though the attack bears hallmarks of Boko Haram activity in the region.
item.dc:creator: BBC

item.title: ⚖️ Israel Threatens Defamation Lawsuit Against NYT Over Sexual Abuse Report
item.description: Israel's Prime Minister Netanyahu and Foreign Minister Sa'ar announced plans to sue the New York Times over a Nicholas Kristof essay alleging sexual abuse of Palestinian prisoners. The Times defended the reporting as rigorously fact-checked, while media law experts questioned whether such a lawsuit by a government could proceed.
item.dc:creator: The Guardian

item.title: 🇷🇼 Rwandan genocide suspect Lucien Kabuga dies at 93 in UN custody
item.description: Lucien Kabuga, accused of financing the 1994 genocide in Rwanda, has died in custody at age 93. He was one of the last remaining suspects from the international tribunal.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🚀 BlackRock weighs $5-10B investment in SpaceX IPO
item.description: BlackRock is in discussions to invest billions in SpaceX upcoming initial public offering. The investment would be one of the largest pre-IPO commitments in recent market history.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Prime Minister Starmer set to approve $24B defense spending increase
item.description: British PM Keir Starmer is expected to approve an 18 billion pound increase in defense spending as he faces political pressure. The Times reports the increase comes amid global security concerns.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇹🇭 Eight killed as freight train hits bus in Thailand
item.description: At least eight people died and 32 were injured when a freight train struck a bus at a rail crossing in Bangkok, igniting a fire that engulfed the vehicle.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇸🇱 Sierra Leone agrees to accept hundreds of West Africans deported by US
item.description: Sierra Leone has struck a deal with the Trump administration to accept hundreds of deported West African migrants, the latest in a series of agreements aimed at accelerating US removals.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇫🇷🇺🇦 France Ready to Develop Ballistic Missile Defense With Ukraine, Zelensky Says
item.description: French President discussed strengthening capabilities to repel Russian attacks, with Zelensky calling the cooperation an important step in air defense development.
item.dc:creator: Kyiv Independent

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russians Worry More About Strikes at Home Than Front Line for First Time Since 2022
item.description: A new poll shows shifting public anxiety inside Russia, with growing concern about domestic attacks versus battlefield risks as Ukrainian drone strikes intensify.
item.dc:creator: Kyiv Independent
